details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Waterproof

about_item: Enhanced Orthopedic Support: Designed with orthopedic egg-crate foam and supportive bolsters, helping distribute weight evenly and provides the perfect amount of pressure relief and joint support. It is suitable for pets with arthritis, hip dysplasia, joint and muscle stiffness or simply to pamper your puppy that deserves deep sleep.

Waterproof Cover: The dog sofa bed cover features an integrated waterproof liner that forms a reliable barrier, preventing liquids or accidental spills from seeping into the foam. The waterproof liner may not prevent the outer cover from getting wet, but it is designed to ensure the foam core keep dry and maintains its supportive shape, delivering consistent comfort and pressure relief over the long term.

Ultimate Easy-Clean Design: The entire cover (including bolsters) is fully removable, machine washable, and dryer-safe on low heat. It significantly reduces cleaning time, making it effortless to maintain with weekly washes. Since only the cover needs cleaning, it dries quickly and can be reinstalled promptly—keeping your dog’s bed clean and ready for use. (Tip: Remember to zip up before washing.)

Pet Friendly Materials: This orthopedic dog bed crafted with OEKO-TEX Standard 115 certified fabric and CertiPUR-US certified foam, also features a non-slip bottom, creating a secure and cozy resting home for dogs.

Multiple Options for Needs: Available in multiple sizes to suit medium, large, and extra-large breeds and multiple colors to match your home. For detailed dimensions, please refer to the images. Please note that dog bed is vacuum-packed. After unboxing, allow up to 63 hours for it to fully expand to its original, plush shape.

sustainability_features.summary: This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality and appreciate its size, with one mentioning it's perfect for a 70-pound dog. They praise its softness, with one noting it remains cushiony after months of use, and find it comfortable for multiple dogs. The bed is easy to assemble, wash, and customers consider it good value for money. While some customers report the bed holding up well, others mention issues with stitching ripping.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of excellent quality, with one customer specifically praising the orthopedic pad.

examples.snippet: ...But I followed the instructions and WOW what a great dog bed! High quality, egg foam base very soft. Great value for the money! I’d highly recommend.
Great bed. Really soft and comfortable. Is firm and supportive. Great quality bed. Great value for the money. Nice looking bed.
Dogs love it! Love the size, the comfort for my older dog. I like that it is easy to wash. Completely satisfied!
Nicely packed and promptly delivered. Good quality at a reasonable price. My old girl is very comphy.

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the size of the dog bed, describing it as spacious and great for large dogs, with one customer noting it works well for their 70-pound pet.

examples.snippet: ...She hangs off her current bed. This is a great size and has room for ALL the blankets. Firm but comfy....
It was soft and the perfect size. It was a little hard to put the arm in but it is really thick for my senior dog. I also like that it can be washed.
...good replacement for the bed in my bedroom for my tripawd as it is a good size and has the arms he likes to rest his head on.
Large, dog likes it.

insights.title: Softness
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed very plush with plenty of cushion, and one customer mentions it maintains its softness even after months of use.

examples.snippet: It was soft and the perfect size. It was a little hard to put the arm in but it is really thick for my senior dog. I also like that it can be washed.
...got it for our 13 year old mastiff, covers are removable if needed .very soft dog seems to enjoy it cat to sometimes
...Easy to put back together and also super soft. We have 2 of these beds and my dogs love them!
...This is a great size and has room for ALL the blankets. Firm but comfy. The only negative is the stuffing for the bumper....

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed comfortable and cozy, with one customer noting that their pet sleeps well on it.

examples.snippet: This bed is amazing quality and is super sturdy and comfy. I have a hard time finding decent large dog beds and this one is by far the best I’ve had.
Our Great Dane approves! He seems comfortable and it feels super soft. Maybe it will hold up as he tends to 'fluff' his bed before laying down....
...He has plenty of room and he seems very comfortable. I like the color too. It is of good quality and I'm glad I can wash it if I need to.
My dog took to this immediately. Very comfy and warm for him

insights.title: Assembly
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed easy to assemble and use, with one customer noting that the instructions for inserting the cushions were clear.

examples.snippet: ...The bed itself is easy to put together but the bolster filling is just small chunks of foam and not 3 solid pieces so it doesn’t look like the photos...
Easy to assemble, super comfy & soft ! Not hard at all not even the sides! Easy cleaning ! For reference my dog is a shephard mix, 95lbs ! Got an XL
...I think it’s been great for his old bones. It’s very easy to assemble and seems to be made of good quality material. I would recommend it.
It was super easy to put together and the quality is amazing and both my large dogs can fit!!!! Happy fur baby mom!

insights.title: Value for money
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be a great value, appreciating both its price and size.

examples.snippet: Nice size. The dog loves the pillow part when sleeping. Great price and even better that I was offered a discount when the bed was purchased.
Worth the money easy to put together, got it for our 13 year old mastiff, covers are removable if needed .very soft dog seems to enjoy it cat to...
...This bed was a good price and was easy to assemble.
Very easy to put together. Great value! Nixon loves it!!! Will be very easy to clean!

insights.title: Washability
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed easy to wash and appreciate that it can be taken apart for cleaning.

examples.snippet: ...He started using it right away. The bed is easy to clean. Outside he helps pull branches and heavy brush to clear areas. Thank you for this good bed.
We’ve had this bed for 6-8 months now it’s very durable & easy to wash! My girls love it! Plenty of room for the both of them!
...It’s very durable and I love that the cover comes off and it washable. He loves the top layer as well since it’s like a pillow for him.
...I love that he loves it! This bed has a great slipcover theory that washes well. I do not dry it. The color is a muted gray and is durable.

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the dog bed's durability, with some reporting that it holds up well, while others mention issues with stitching ripping and the top pillow being shredded.

examples.snippet: ...This bed seems very comfortable and durable, and my dog loves laying on it. Very happy with this purchase!
...She took to it right away--it is her spot. She sheds A LOT, but the hair releases pretty good with my clothing brush....
...It seems very durable and comfortable for the dogs. The cover can be removed easily making it easy to wash. It looks nice, and is good quality.
...Material is soft. Dog lays on it everyday and it is holding up. Great value for the price - puppy has lots of growing room. So glad I got this bed.

authors_reviews.title: Of good quality, roomy and added cushioning. Reasonable price for what you get.
authors_reviews.text: Bought this bed for my 10 year old GSD that has arthritis and hip dysplasia. The removable cover (for laundering), egg crate foam, and bolster should make it extra comfortable for her to lay on. It was easy to assemble and provides plenty of space for her. He is 60 pounds. I have inexpensive padded rugs (from Costco) in strategic locations around the house for her to lay on. This will provide much more comfort and should be easy to launder when needed. If I weren't recently retired and on a fixed income. I would replace the padded rugs with these beds throughout the house.
authors_reviews.author: Marc H. Caplan

authors_reviews.title: Love this dog bed
authors_reviews.text: Love the size it’s fits both my medium (50-60lbs) dogs plus another. It’s easy to clean the outer layer unzips easily definitely recommend to vacuum it first and shave out any dog hair then it can go in the washer and dryer the inside is easy to wipe down. Very soft and comfortable for my older dogs. Also looks good and zippers and easy to use.
authors_reviews.author: Alysha Goudy

authors_reviews.title: Great dog bed!
authors_reviews.text: Just bought a second one. First one lasted 2.5 years, with a Great Dane, who absolutely loves this bed. The foam did not flatten out or lose support after the 2.5 years, despite occasional digging to china on this bed. Zip off cover cleans very easily, and although stuffing the bolster can be a bit challenging when it is all fluffed and bed is freshly cleaned it really holds up.Only reason I had to replace was my girl was afflicted by some tummy troubles that I was not willing to clean off a Breat Dane sized poopy off of the cover, and 2.5 years seemed fair to go ahead and purchase another quality product. I’m glad to see that the pro looks the same still!Reasonably priced and worth the money!
authors_reviews.author: Sarah

authors_reviews.title: Roomy and comfortable for two dogs. Ours love it.
authors_reviews.text: Great dog bed. Fits great in the back of our SUV.
authors_reviews.author: peggy ann

authors_reviews.title: Good bed. Great sale price.
authors_reviews.text: So far so good. Great sale price. 50lb dog loves it, definitely big enough for another dog. Don't know yet if its truly waterproof, I just got it 5 days ago. It doesn't look like it's waterproof, unless top cover is waterproof underneath. Or black inner cover is removable. I didn't put it together to see a zipper for removal. Hopefully i will not hv to buy another one, if not waterproof.
authors_reviews.author: marissa nicole cadd

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable with soft material, and multiple zippers to enable easy washing of the cover
authors_reviews.text: Great dog bed, soft material. This bed has two zipper compartments, one for the pillow and one for the bed. The one for the bed zips around two sides, so it's very easy to get the cover on and off the bed to wash it. My 100lb yellow lab Max loves it!
authors_reviews.author: Travis M Thomas

authors_reviews.title: Great Price for Extra Large dog bed
authors_reviews.text: Easy to assemble. The bolster arrived with the stuffing bunched up in a few places. I jiggled it and shook it until the inside padding distributed more evenly. This padded bed is perfect for our extra large Anatolian Shepherd herd guardian. The dog is 26" tall and 49" long and she loves this new bed. It lets her lay down completely supported. She usually sleeps on the ground near the animals, but had an old worn out flat bed. This one fits nicely in her new doghouse. In her last few years with joint pain, this comfortable bed will let her rest well.
authors_reviews.author: Laura

authors_reviews.title: Excellent quality… our dogs love this bed!!!
authors_reviews.text: I have an 80 pound husky who absolutely loves this bed. The bed is high-quality and unbelievably soft not to mention extremely durable. We have had the bed for over a year and it has not ripped or stained…. The cover can be easily washed, and I can actually run the vacuum over the dog bed without it getting caught in the vacuum. Excellent quality for price I would not hesitate to purchase this again!!! both dogs absolutely love this bed!!
authors_reviews.author: Kerry Maione

other_countries_reviews.text: Buen tamaño al precio, para border collieFácil de lavar, no esta ostentosa la cubiertaLa felpa no se siente tan calienteSi le dieron ganas de rascarla y morderla. así que espero haya repuestos hahaValió la pena
other_countries_reviews.author: Eros bb

other_countries_reviews.title: Worst product. Not an orthopedic egg crate
other_countries_reviews.text: Not as what's shown in picture. It's just an ordinary foam there is no egg crate. Also the thickness shown in picture is different comparison to what's given. Image also shows brand label here it's like any ordinary bed.Plus had ordered blue and got black. Even if you press it's just like some plastic inaide
other_countries_reviews.author: Dipti S

other_countries_reviews.title: Comodidad
other_countries_reviews.text: Me encantó la cama ortopédica para mi perrita. Ya que se nota que a ella le gusta dormir ahí! La recomiendo totalmente. Vale la pena el precio.
other_countries_reviews.author: Alejandra Duarte
